mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id AS tenantId, release_id AS releaseId, approval_status AS approvalStatus, requested_by AS requestedBy, requested_at AS requestedAt, reviewed_by AS reviewedBy, reviewed_at AS reviewedAt, review_comment AS reviewComment, expired_at AS expiredAt, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM batch.config_approval WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND release_id = #{releaseId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, tenant_id AS tenantId, release_id AS releaseId, approval_status AS approvalStatus, requested_by AS requestedBy, requested_at AS requestedAt, reviewed_by AS reviewedBy, reviewed_at AS reviewedAt, review_comment AS reviewComment, expired_at AS expiredAt, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM batch.config_approval WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO batch.config_approval ( tenant_id, release_id, approval_status, requested_by, review_comment, expired_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{releaseId}, #{approvalStatus}, #{requestedBy}, #{reviewComment}, #{expiredAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE batch.config_approval SET approval_status = 'APPROVED', reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, review_comment = #{reviewComment}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id} AND approval_status = 'PENDING'

UPDATE batch.config_approval SET approval_status = 'REJECTED', reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, review_comment = #{reviewComment}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id} AND approval_status = 'PENDING'
